projectDescription: The best free and open-source automated time tracker — cross-platform, extensible, and privacy-focused, storing all data locally on your machine.
keyFeatures: Automatic time tracking across applications, windows, and browser tabs
AFK (Away From Keyboard) detection via keyboard and mouse monitoring
Privacy-first: all data stored locally on the user's machine
Cross-platform support: Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android
Extensible watcher system for tracking custom activity types
Rich web dashboard with timeline, activity summaries, and category breakdowns
REST API for programmatic access and custom integrations
Query scripting language for filtering, merging, and transforming event data
Browser extension for tracking web browsing activity
Sync support via external tools (Syncthing, Dropbox, etc.)
publicApiSurface: GET /api/0/buckets/{bucket_id}/events — Get events from a bucket
POST /api/0/buckets/{bucket_id}/events — Insert events into a bucket
POST /api/0/buckets/{bucket_id}/heartbeat — Send a heartbeat to update current state
POST /api/0/query/ — Execute a query against stored events
GET /api/0/info — Get server metadata and version info
aw_client.ActivityWatchClient — Python client library for interacting with the server
aw_core.models.Event — Core event data model (timestamp, duration, data)
aw_core.models.Bucket — Bucket metadata model (id, type, client, hostname)
